meta.title: MathSpark — Concept Map Visualisation
meta.description: Interactive visual data for rendering the complete math concept landscape. Each domain is an 'island' that students explore. Nodes glow as they're mastered.

renderingHints.glowEffect: mastered nodes pulse with golden glow

zoomLevels.domain: Zoom into one island to see all concepts
zoomLevels.detail: See one concept with its prerequisites and dependents
